description: Legal certification written by Evyatar ha-Kohen "upon whom the name of God is called, the son of a Gaʾon and grandson of a Gaʾon." Dating: ca. 1100, according to CUDL. Stating that the witnesses affirm the correctness of a certain account. The witnesses are Yehuda b. Shabbat and ʿUlla b. Yosef ha-Levi. The fragment also contains copious Arabic accounts (see separate record). VMR
description_he: אישור משפטי מאביתר הכהן, בערך 1100. העדים מאשרים נכונות חשבון. עדים: יהודה בן שבת ועוּלא בן יוסף הלוי.
